moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.notes: Shadow Ball lasts 69 frames. fully charged takes 100 frames

moves.name: Teleport
moves.notes: no hitbox, active refers to appearing/disapear

moves.name: Rapid Jabs
moves.notes: After last hitbox there is an additional 13 frame cooldown

moves.name: Tech-Roll Forward
moves.notes:
Horizontal Movement At: 17
Distance: 13.6 ft
Invincible: 1-20 (If the roll takes you to an edge and you try to move/crouch/jump/shield as it ends you will slip off)

animationCredit.name: Lab @ 999, made by Renzo and Maximus

moves.name: Tech-Roll Backward
moves.notes:
Horizontal Movement At: 17
Distance: 13.4 ft
Invincible: 1-20 (If the roll takes you to an edge you will slip off unless you WALK forward, or if an attack is timed on that exact frame)

animationCredit.name: Lab @ 999, made by Renzo and Maximus

Input an upwards direction anywhere on 1-4 for walljump tech on 6)
